examples: Because interracial roommate relationships are often problematic.
At Indiana University, where housing was not so tight, more interracial roommates split up.
Researchers also observed problems resulting from pairing interracial students in residences.
Deep Fried Man's act includes an ode to interracial love that gets the audience clapping along.
This interracial teen romance set in Detroit makes a fumbling plea for integration and tolerance.
